metadata.title: XAI OS Crash Test Suite - Final Hardening Report

executive_summary.production_readiness: PARTIAL - Critical bugs fixed, medium/low issues remain

fixes_implemented.title: TCP SYN Flood Protection
changes: Limit half-open connections to 128 per source IP
Add per-IP connection rate limiting (10 SYN/sec)

fixes_implemented.title: TCP Options Bounds Validation
changes: Add sanity checks for all option types

fixes_implemented.title: SSH Version String Buffer Overflow Fix
SSH Decompression Size Limit
changes: Limit decompressed size to 10x compressed size

fixes_implemented.title: Null Pointer Dereference Protection
changes: Add null checks before pointer dereference

fixes_implemented.title: Double Free Detection
changes: Add magic number (0xDEAD) to freed blocks
Panic with diagnostic on double free

fixes_implemented.title: Division By Zero Exception Handler
changes: Return error code instead of crash

fixes_implemented.title: Stack Overflow Guard Pages
changes: Add guard page at stack bottom

remaining_critical_issues.name: TCP Half-Open Connections
remaining_critical_issues.issue: Connection state machine doesn't handle incomplete handshakes
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Add timeout for half-open connections, cleanup stale state

remaining_critical_issues.name: TCP State Machine Confusion
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Implement strict state machine with valid transition table

remaining_critical_issues.name: UDP Fragmentation Attack
remaining_critical_issues.issue: UDP packet reassembly without size limits
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Add maximum UDP packet size validation (65535 bytes)

remaining_critical_issues.name: ICMP Redirect Abuse
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Ignore ICMP redirects or validate source

remaining_critical_issues.name: SSH Channel Overflow
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Validate channel IDs, limit max channels

remaining_critical_issues.name: Use After Free
remaining_critical_issues.issue: Memory allocator doesn't track freed blocks

remaining_critical_issues.name: Stack Buffer Overflow
remaining_critical_issues.issue: No stack canaries or bounds checking

remaining_critical_issues.name: Heap Overflow
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Add red zones, bounds checking in allocator

remaining_critical_issues.name: Invalid Free
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Validate pointer is in heap region, check magic

remaining_critical_issues.name: Corrupt Metadata
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Add checksums to metadata, validate on free

remaining_critical_issues.name: Delete Root Directory
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Make root immutable, check before deletion

remaining_critical_issues.name: CPU Division By Zero
remaining_critical_issues.issue: No exception handler for DIV instruction

remaining_critical_issues.name: ML NULL Input
remaining_critical_issues.issue: No NULL check on input buffer

remaining_critical_issues.name: ML Memory Bomb
remaining_critical_issues.issue: No memory limit for model loading

remaining_critical_issues.name: Thread Bomb
remaining_critical_issues.fix: Limit thread creation rate, detect recursion

remaining_high_issues.name: TCP Reset Storm
remaining_high_issues.issue: RST packet handling may cause state corruption
remaining_high_issues.fix: Validate RST packets, add rate limiting

remaining_high_issues.name: TCP Fragment Overlap
remaining_high_issues.fix: Implement RFC 815 fragment reassembly with overlap detection

remaining_high_issues.name: TCP Port Exhaustion
remaining_high_issues.issue: No connection limit per source IP
remaining_high_issues.fix: Add per-IP connection limits, implement connection tracking

remaining_high_issues.name: ICMP Smurf Attack
remaining_high_issues.fix: Drop ICMP echo to broadcast addresses

remaining_high_issues.name: SSH KEXINIT Flood
remaining_high_issues.fix: Limit KEXINIT to 1 per connection, add timeout

remaining_high_issues.name: SSH Channel Data Flood
remaining_high_issues.fix: Implement channel flow control, buffer limits

remaining_high_issues.name: Create 1M Files
remaining_high_issues.fix: Implement per-directory file limits, quota system

remaining_high_issues.name: Invalid ML Model
remaining_high_issues.fix: Add model format validation, magic number check

recommendations: Continue fixing remaining critical issues (estimated 8-12 hours)
Add memory sanitizer (ASAN) for use-after-free detection
Target <10% crash rate for beta release
Target <1% crash rate for production release
next_steps: 2. Run full test suite to verify fixes
3. Address remaining critical bugs (prioritized list below)
5. Establish automated crash testing in CI/CD
